title: quercus biglandulosa
intro: Quercus biglandulosa, also known as the evergreen live oak or Taiwan evergreen oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to Taiwan. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Quercus biglandulosa include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal products.
